sprintGoal: 生成一份关于"2026世界杯冠军预测"的高质量深度研究报告

dimensions.name: source_diversity
dimensions.description: 数据来源多样性：是否同时包含外部（Exa）和内部（ES）数据源

dimensions.name: data_completeness
dimensions.description: 数据完整性：所有 source 字段非空、URL 合法、无重复

dimensions.name: search_coverage
dimensions.description: 搜索覆盖度：来源数量 >= 阈值、snippet 非空率 >= 80%

dimensions.name: report_structure
dimensions.description: 报告结构：包含必要章节标题、有来源引用编号

dimensions.name: pipeline_metrics
dimensions.description: 管道指标：生成时间在合理范围内、来源数与报告长度匹配

negotiationHistory.changes: Proposed default contract with 4 dimensions: factual_accuracy (30%), structural_completeness (25%), analysis_depth (25%), citation_quality (20%)

roundResults.evaluatorFeedback:
**总评**: Backend: 14/15 checks passed, 17 sources, 22 citations, report 3.5k chars

**评分**: source_diversity=10 | data_completeness=10 | search_coverage=10 | report_structure=10 | pipeline_metrics=5

**优点**:
  + source_diversity: 10.0/10 (3/3 checks)
  + data_completeness: 10.0/10 (4/4 checks)
  + search_coverage: 10.0/10 (2/2 checks)

**不足**:

**改进建议**:
  1. [pipeline_metrics] Report generation < 120s: unknown
